message:
licensing: adopt MIT + OpenAI/Anthropic rider across workspace metadata

Summary:
- Replace root license text with the MIT license variant that includes the OpenAI/Anthropic rider.
- Update public license references so repository docs and crate metadata point at the rider license file.

What changed:
- Root license text replaced in  with the rider version.
-  license badge and license section updated to reference  and the rider naming.
- Workspace and member crate package metadata switched from SPDX  to explicit  pointers:
  -
  -
  -
  -
  -
  -
  -

Why this structure:
- Keeps licensing and package-metadata changes isolated from runtime and testing code changes.
- Ensures crates published from this workspace resolve license terms from a single canonical file.

Notes:
- No code paths, APIs, or runtime behavior changed in this commit.
- This commit intentionally only touches licensing/documentation/package metadata surfaces.

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ exclude = ["fuzz"]
 name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.2.4"
 edition = "2024"
-license = "MIT"
+license-file = "LICENSE"
 description = "Spec-first, cancel-correct, capability-secure async runtime for Rust."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
 readme = "README.md"

@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ [![CI](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync/actions/workflows/ci.yml) -[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) +[![License: MIT+Rider](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT%2BOpenAI%2FAnthropic%20Rider-blue.svg)](./LICENSE) [![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-1.75+-orange.svg)](https://www.rust-lang.org/) [![Status: Active Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Active%20Development-brightgreen)](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync) @@ -1020,4 +1020,4 @@ Open an issue at https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync/issues ## License -MIT +MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider). See `LICENSE`.

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@

-license = "MIT"
+license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Proc macros for asupersync structured concurrency runtime"

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ name = "asupersync-conformance"
 version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 description = "Conformance test suite for async runtime specifications"

+license-file = "../LICENSE"

 readme = "README.md"
 keywords = ["async", "conformance", "runtime", "testing"]
